title: Add formatDate utility function with unit tests
description: Create src/utils/dateUtils.ts with a formatDate(date: Date, locale: string): string utility function including JSDoc documentation, and add a co-located src/utils/dateUtils.test.ts with unit tests using vitest.

existing_patterns.description: Single-function utility module co-located with its Result type; follows the pattern of single-function files in src/utils/ with co-located .test.ts files
